ModMetadata.Name: Template [StationeersLaunchPad]
ModMetadata.Author: vinus
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]Template[/h1] [b]WARNING:[/b] This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
you can also go here to get the dll itself if you want to just put it in your bepinex/plugins folder: https://github.com/TerameTechYT/StationeersSharp/
